title: Ichchapuram Heavy Rain
lead: Ichchapuram is experiencing extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.60. This critical event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating severe weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Ichchapuram is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 86% and moderate wind speed of 7.6 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) of 11.6 GG and zero Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicate a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety.
